name: Pennsylvania Office of Attorney General Home Improvement Contractor Search
updateFrequency: unknown; verify against the official home improvement contractor search before relying on freshness assumptions
licenseTypesIncluded: Pennsylvania home improvement contractor registrations exposed by the official OAG search
knownExclusions: The official search states that search results display active registrations only.
Registration under HICPA is not an endorsement, recommendation, or approval by the Pennsylvania Office of Attorney General.
Local permits, municipal licenses, and non-home-improvement trade authorizations are outside this source entry.
rateLimitNotes: No adapter is implemented. The official search mentions downloadable XLSX search results, but redistribution permission is not confirmed.
publicRecordsNotes: Official lookup source metadata only. The source states that reuse of displayed content requires permission from the Press Office; absence from this source is not proof that a license or registration does not exist elsewhere.
officialBulkDownloadNotes: The official search page says results can be downloaded as XLSX, but terms and redistribution permission require further review before adapter implementation.
researchNotes: Registry-only source for Pennsylvania home improvement contractor registration. Future work should research fixture-safe column names and the official download behavior without committing public bulk rows.
maintainerNotes: Preserve active-registration-only and non-endorsement caveats in any future verification output.
